content:
MODULE: cosmos.interfaces.messaging.base
FILE: cosmos/interfaces/messaging/base.py (100 lines)
CATEGORY: interfaces

DESCRIPTION: Messaging Bridge Interface for cosmos.

This module defines the abstract base classes for the "Omni-Channel" messaging system,
allowing cosmos to connect to Discord, Slack, Telegram, etc.

CLASSES:
- MessageSource(Enum)
- IncomingMessage: A message received from an external platform.
- OutgoingMessage: A message to be sent to an external platform.
- MessagingProvider(ABC): Abstract base class for messaging platform adapters.
  Methods: def set_callback(self, callback: Callable[[IncomingMessage], Awaitable[None]])
  Methods: async def connect(self)
  Methods: async def disconnect(self)
  Methods: async def send_message(self, message: OutgoingMessage)
- NotificationCenter: Central hub for broadcasting proactive notifications (The "Clawdbot" Feature).
  Methods: def register_provider(self, provider: MessagingProvider)
  Methods: async def broadcast(self, message: str, title: Optional[str]=None)
